texto: Well, first you will have to eat again, not just like you Earth people do, but the corvalen, one dose is not enough. And once you start down that path, you want more, you need more, and then there is the end of your peaceful life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sara Zaske: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Well, first you will have to eat again, not just like you Earth people do, but the corvalen, one …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, capitalism, hunger pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e hunger.
